title: Biet Doi Rat On
overview: The Ideal Squad is a Comedy, revolving around the duo Khue (Hoang Oanh) and Phong (Hua Vi Van). After a chance encounter, the duo drags Bay Cuc (Vo Tan Phat), Bay Suc (Nguyen Thao), Quau (Ngoc Phuoc), Quo (Ngoc Hoa) to participate in a special mission: Swapping the attached bracelet. kiss with precious diamonds and reveal the true face of Tuan (Quang Tuan) - Khue's ex-husband at the wedding between him and Tu Xoan (Le Khanh) - a female giant in the West who owns a million dollar fortune. The reluctant combination of The Ideal Squad - Phong, Khue and the Family Cuc Suc aimed at the eyes of the "bride and groom" at the luxurious resort promises to be extremely thrilling, suspenseful but no less humorous, emotional.
